gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved the requirements-matrix strict-artifact validation diff with no findings; reviewer verified tests/test_release_bundle.py passed.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q -> 90 passed
poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests -> passed
what_changed: Made requirements-matrix validation require every strict release-bundle artifact label from STRICT_V1_RELEASE_REQUIRED_ARTIFACTS.
Normalized whitespace while checking required matrix snippets so Markdown wrapping remains valid.
Added a regression that removes a strict artifact label from an otherwise valid V1 requirements matrix and expects release-bundle validation to reject it.
why: The V1 requirements matrix is now included in strict release bundles, so stale matrices must fail release-bundle validation when they stop documenting the enforced artifact set.
